chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.T.A No.38 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ Hearing of case 1.For orders as to non-prosecution of CMA No.6540/2024 2.For hg of main case 05.08.2024. Petitioner Mst. Sonia is present in person. Respondent Syed Fareed-ul-Haq is present in person. By consent, this application is allowed. Guardian and Ward Application No.1707/2023 and Family Suit No.1387/2022 pending in the Court of XIIth Civil & Family Judge, Karachi-Central are hereby withdrawn from his file and transferred to learned XIVth Civil & Family Judge, Karachi-Central with direction to expeditiously dispose of the same. Respondent submits that the Family Judge may be directed to decide his application for interim meeting with his minor son. Order accordingly. The application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE HANIF
